questions.question_text: Write a précis of the following and suggest a suitable title.
Read the following passage carefully and answer the questions given at the end.
Why does the doctrine of power set by neo-imperial America deny space to counselling?
What is the essence of ‘moral equivalence’ whereas War has no moral justification?
Why do countries occupied and under the tutelage of hyperpower have no peace?
Arguably Europe and hyperpower US are at cross purposes over the concept of war. Are they? Why?
What did Tony Blair mean by ‘wise counsel’, and did it prevail?
Correct only FIVE of the following.
Punctuate the following text, where necessary.
Re-write the following sentences (ONLY FIVE) after filling in the blanks with appropriate Prepositions.
Use only FIVE of the pairs of words in sentences clearly illustrating their meanings.
Translate the following into English by keeping in view figurative/idiomatic expressions.
